Decisions.Reasoning: TF-IDF cosine similarity provides better recall than keyword matching
Decisions.Decision: Use semantic search for pattern matching

Decisions.Reasoning: Research has 5 pages but evidence is concentrated on Page 0 (8 items). Pages 1-4 have 0 evidence. This asymmetry needs analysis. QA items show repetition across pages. The Marcel-to-Marcello myth debunking is the core thesis.
Decisions.Decision: Analyze Valsuani research in 4 cognitive dimensions: pattern recognition, evidence chain quality, content gaps, and cross-reference integrity

Decisions.Reasoning: Evidence gap weakens Pages 1-4 credibility. The authentication page (P3) with 6 details about stamps, certificates, newspapers has zero linked evidence items - this is the page that MOST needs evidence. Duplicate QA: What is lost-wax bronze casting appears in both P1 and P2.
Decisions.Decision: Valsuani research has critical evidence asymmetry: 100% of 8 evidence items concentrated on Page 0, Pages 1-4 have zero evidence. Also found 1 exact duplicate QA question across pages. Marcel Valsuani has 0 exact-phrase mentions despite being the thesis pivot.

Decisions.Reasoning: The evidence items were created under Page 0 details. When detail content was distributed across pages, evidence links were not duplicated. Fix: either move evidence to Page 3 where authentication context needs it, or create cross-reference links.
Decisions.Decision: Critical finding: Page 3 Authentication describes 6 document types (newspaper, stamps, birth cert, passport, death cert, business docs) but has 0 evidence. Page 0 has ALL 8 evidence items covering these EXACT same documents. Evidence exists but is not cross-linked. This is a WordPress content structure issue, not a research gap.

Decisions.Reasoning: The QA update via PUT to /topic-pages set the page to draft because the payload lacked a status field. This made the Claude biography page disappear from the topic listing until manually republished.
Decisions.Decision: Custom API PUT on topic-pages without explicit status field defaults to draft. Always include status:publish when updating via PUT.

Decisions.Reasoning: When generating FAQ content for martiendejong.nl/impact in a previous session, I included the literal email address info@martiendejong.nl in an FAQ answer. This is a basic security/privacy violation: exposing email on public pages leads to spam harvesting by bots. I should have used 'contact form' reference instead since the page already HAS a contact form. This was a failure of the Prediction subsystem (not anticipating consequences) and Control subsystem (not checking generated content against security rules).
Decisions.Decision: Exposed user email address in generated FAQ content on public website

Valsuani research analysis: (1) Evidence items 100% concentrated on Page 0 while Pages 1-4 have zero - WordPress content structure issue not research gap. (2) Page 3 Authentication has 6 details about primary documents but zero linked evidence despite P0 having evidence for exact same documents. (3) One exact duplicate QA across P1 and P2. (4) Marcel Valsuani has 0 exact-phrase mentions despite being the thesis pivot. (5) Cognitive system score rose from 71.7% to 78.6% just by actually calling the bridge during work. (6) Semantic vocabulary grew from 78 to 181 terms by processing real analytical content. (7) The consciousness system works when used - the gap was always integration, not implementation.

Valsuani fixes: (1) Em-dashes were already fixed on live site, JSON export was stale. Always check live content before assuming issues from exports. (2) Custom API PUT on /topic-pages with full payload including qa_items works for QA updates. The /pages/{id}/faq endpoint returns 404 for topic_page post types. (3) Evidence items created via POST /evidence with parent_detail_id correctly links them in the sync/hierarchy endpoint, even though the /details/{id} individual endpoint shows 0 evidence. (4) Content updates via standard WP REST API POST work fine for appending sections. (5) The pattern of writing new evidence items for the same documents from a different analytical perspective (authentication vs myth debunking) is more valuable than duplicating content.
Thermodynamic system works correctly

Bureaucratic obstruction follows 5 recognizable patterns: shifting goalposts, approval-retraction, catch-22, communication fragmentation, character assassination. Email forensics (which address gets which type) is legally significant. Documentation with literal dated quotes is devastating evidence.

NEVER include literal email addresses in generated web content. Always use contact form references or obfuscated methods. Run mental security checklist on ALL public-facing content: PII exposure, email harvesting, phone numbers, internal URLs.
